public_reputation: Recognized as a field captain of regional weight.
appearance: Cold-ready layered gear, ward-conscious fastening, and containment-minded kit signal disciplined caution.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of field captain in and around Sheresh Dome Stewards, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Sheresh Dome Stewards while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to mutational drift is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Rime Rimebridge may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Rime Rimebridge as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Field Captain, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
what_they_refuse: Rime Rimebridge refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Field Captain too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Rime Rimebridge can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Rime Rimebridge adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Rime Rimebridge is Recognized as a field captain of regional weight. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Field Captain.
social_texture: Rime Rimebridge speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Sheresh Dome Stewards, people read them as spell-literate, aesthetically alert, and wary of magical contamination.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to reagents; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but mutational drift becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Rime touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Rime Rimebridge when the party needs a socially grounded face for Sheresh Dome Stewards: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
